Video.summary: A man stages a sit-in in his car in an attempt to stop it from being towed. A homeowner denies that he’s selling drugs despite the large amount of evidence found in his home. A safe full of evidence is found during a traffic stop.
Video.title: Safe Cracking

Video.summary: Officers chase a fleeing suspect as he runs through the woods and into a rose bush. An elderly man puts himself in the middle of a knife fight. Two brothers disagree over letting officers search their car.
Video.title: And Through the Woods

Video.summary: Deputies respond to a call of a man shooting a gun in his front yard. Officers are called to a domestic dispute over a wrinkly infant’s shirt. Four armed and suspicious men are spotted by deputies.
Video.title: Yard Work

Video.summary: An officer is forced to subdue a suspect with his baton. A man asks deputies to give him back his drugs before taking him to jail. A man under the influence causes a disturbance at an apartment complex.
Video.title: Keep it Down!

Video.summary: Deputies pursue a man wanted in connection with a family violence call. Detectives are called to a dispute between neighbors over an unleashed dog. Officers stop a suspect and find paperwork containing dozens of others Social Security numbers.
Video.title: Doggie Dispute

Video.summary: Officers wrestle an uncooperative driver to the ground after a traffic stop. Deputies search for a man who sent threatening texts to his ex-girlfriend. Two suspects are caught stealing gas.
Video.title: Petrol Heist

Video.summary: Deputies confront an intoxicated man who threatened a restaurant owner. A man tells officers he can assault who he wants. Officers are called to an altercation over a sleeping bag and a backpack.
Video.title: Check Please!

Video.summary: An undercover police officer sets up a sting to buy drugs. Officers find a surprise in a suspect’s trunk. A man claims that a prostitute has kidnapped him.
Video.title: She Came Onto Me

Video.summary: Police set up a undercover operation to bust a suspect who wants to hire a hit man to kill her husband. Unknown to her, the hit man she hired is an undercover police officer. The suspect denies doing anything wrong despite all of her crimes being caught on camera.
Video.title: Hitman for Hire

Video.summary: A suspect attempts to flee when officers tell him they will search him. Two men get in a fight over window installation. A hotel room is filled like a clown car with multiple suspects.
Video.title: Two Mr. Fix Its

Video.summary: A couple calls for help when a man breaks into their home. A school bus is involved in a hit and run accident. Officer find a one gallon bag of contraband in a suspect’s car.
Video.title: A Bag, a Bus and a Break In

Image.alt: A Bag, a Bus and a Break In
A Bag, a Bus and a Break In
A Bag, a Bus and a Break In
A Bag, a Bus and a Break In
A Bag, a Bus and a Break In
A Bag, a Bus and a Break In
A Bag, a Bus and a Break In
A Bag, a Bus and a Break In
A Bag, a Bus and a Break In

Video.summary: Officers break up a fight between a couple in the middle of the street. Not even a church is immune to being robbed. A dispute between neighbors involves deadly weapons.
Video.title: Sinning and Thieving

Video.summary: Officers search for a runaway suspect with a weapons charge. A man admits to having a large number of drugs during a traffic stop. Officers respond to a man with a gun in an alley.
Video.title: Alleycat

Video.summary: Deputies chase a man who flees a routine traffic stop. Deputies find drugs on a man who gives them an expired license. Officers respond to a man attacking several patrons in a bar.
Video.title: Last Call Brawl

Video.summary: A man wanted for unpaid child support hides from deputies. Officers respond to a sexual predator following a minor. A man with a checkered driving record crashes his car.
Video.title: He's the Gingerbread Man

Video.summary: A jaywalker with no ID bolts away from an officer. A man mixes illicit items with his pizza. A woman involved in a domestic violence call blames her monthly issues.
Video.title: Dangerous Toppings

Video.summary: A man fights with his wife over a haircut then leads police on a car chase. A woman gets violent with her boyfriend and then calls the police on him. An intoxicated woman tells deputies she only had two drinks.
Video.title: Two Too Many

Video.summary: Deputies respond to a fight between a daughter’s boyfriend and her mother. A woman lights candles after an attempted break-in. Police respond when an evicted tenant tries to reenter his old apartment.
Video.title: Candlelight Burglar

Video.summary: During a routine traffic stop, an Officer recognizes the passengers from a prior drug related arrest. A K-9 unit assists in the pursuit of a grand theft auto suspect who flees on foot. An arrest is made after a couple leaving a known drug house is pulled over and questioned.
Video.title: Bail Fail

Video.summary: A man throws out his narcotics during a foot-chase with police. A woman is arrested for possession of drug paraphernalia. Officers call for back-up after a woman is held at knife-point.
Video.title: Hard Ticket

Video.summary: Deputies are called to a vehicle burglary in progress at an apartment complex. A traffic stop results in the discovery of drug paraphernalia. An Officer locates a stolen van and discovers drug paraphernalia in the suspect’s purse.
Video.title: Grand Theft Auto

Video.summary: Officers are called to a burglary at a warehouse housing expensive items. Police are called to the scene of a threatening man with a knife. Officers thwart an attempted suicide during a traffic stop.
Video.title: Just Browsing

Video.summary: Officers are assaulted by the brother of a suspect who is resisting arrest. A resident sprays water on his neighbor’s noisy dogs. Officers recover drugs and cash after pulling over a motorist.
Video.title: Who Wet the Dogs Out

Video.summary: Deputies assist an injured woman who vows revenge on her male attackers. A woman tells Deputies her husband beat her in front of their children. Officers protect an elderly woman from an abusive child.
Video.title: Bruised But Not Broken

Video.summary: An out-of-control woman needs to be subdued after an arrest. Deputies spot an erratic driver who appears to be under the influence. A car is seen driving backwards on a one-way street.
Video.title: Anger Management

Video.summary: An officer coordinates a reverse prostitution sting to capture suspects who solicit prostitutes. An inebriated man is detained until he sobers up. Officers stop a stolen vehicle.
Video.title: Misrepresented

Video.summary: Officers are dispatched to an apartment complex where a young girl may have been a victim of a sexual assault. An officer spots a speeding motorcycle and attempts a routine stop.
Video.title: Two-Wheeling Away

Video.summary: Officers respond to an assault call at a local residence. A juvenile with a firearm is detained. Officers respond to a report of a man firing a gun in front of his residence.
Video.title: Copy of Warning shot

Video.summary: The occupants of a car with out-of-state plates try to conceal their identities. Officers investigate a vehicle lingering near a park known. An officer investigates a robbery at a truck stop.
Video.title: Don't Keep on Truckin

Video.summary: Instead of facing the music, a suspect flees from officers down an embankment. A suspect takes a walk through the neighborhood with a BB gun. A innocent pedestrian gets more than she bargained for when she’s hit in a two vehicle collision.
Video.title: Rough Walk

Video.summary: Deputies are forced to tase a man after pursuing him into a field. A driver plays dumb when asked about the revolver under his car seat. Officers respond to two teenage girls in a fight.
Video.title: Mean Girls Times Two

Video.summary: During an arrest, a suspect decides to pop the question to his girlfriend. An abandoned house becomes the target of burglary. Two brothers’ dispute over a business matter leads to violence.
Video.title: I Take This Criminal

Video.summary: Officers attempt to detain undocumented people crosssing the border. Border patrol discovers a driver with a load of drugs in his car. Officers check passports and a suspicious-looking laptop.
Video.title: Borderlands

Video.summary: A woman hides in her apartment after she skips out on paying her cab fare. A knife fight results in multiple calls to the police for help. A French tourist get a bus ride from Hell in Florida.
Video.title: No Money, More Problems

Video.summary: A man claims to be protecting the car he breaks into. Officers respond when a couple gets too friendly while out in public. Police are dispatched when a drunk woman pounds on her neighbor’s door.
Video.title: Get a Room

Video.summary: In Las Vegas, officers stop to talk to a young woman who appears to be soliciting prostitution. A father accuses his son of breaking his jaw. While running from officers, a suspect attempts to drop evidence on the street.
Video.title: Jawbreaker

Video.summary: A suspect races through the neighborhood after his scooter can’t outrun police. Cops discover a drugged, incoherent wild man lying in the bushes. Officers try to make peace between neighbors with pit bull problems.
Video.title: Blood and Scars, Bro!

Video.summary: A high-speed chase ends when the suspect plays chicken with a concrete pole. An emotional man just wants the cops to give him a little kiss. A melee breaks out when a woman seizes her beau's cell phone.
Video.title: Cell Phone Secrets

Video.summary: A fleeing vehicle goes for a spin when officers execute a perfect PIT maneuver. Cops try to flush out a suspect who barricades himself inside a donut shop. Officers hit the meth mother lode when they stop a truck in a downpour.
Video.title: Late Night Snacks

Video.summary: Cops attempt to piece together whether or not an erratic driver is in a stolen vehicle. A knife-wielding man complains that rude neighbors won’t stop smoking pot. Officers come upon an emotional man with a blade to his throat.
Video.title: Step Away From the Cutlery

Video.summary: A suspect runs through a hotel fence and then gives an employee some shocking news. Officers come upon two brothers who have just been in a knife fight. Cops arrive after an unruly man fires his BB gun at a neighbor’s child.
Video.title: You’ll Shoot Your Eye Out

Video.summary: The new chief in town oversees a series of undercover drug buys. Officers arrest a drunken man who can’t stop talking. A domestic abuse suspect admits to laying the smack down on her mooching husband.
Video.title: I’ll Raise My Voice Right Back

Image.alt: I’ll Raise My Voice Right Back
I’ll Raise My Voice Right Back
I’ll Raise My Voice Right Back
I’ll Raise My Voice Right Back
I’ll Raise My Voice Right Back
I’ll Raise My Voice Right Back
I’ll Raise My Voice Right Back
I’ll Raise My Voice Right Back
I’ll Raise My Voice Right Back

Video.summary: A DUI suspect reminds an officer of one famous dude. A naked man shocks a stranger on her porch. A daughter’s tantrum shakes the whole apartment when mom takes away Facebook.
Video.title: Facebook Fury

Video.summary: A suspect goes out to get his haircut and winds up in jail. Officers try to piece together a puzzling street fight between a boxer and his confused friend. Cops give a suspect every chance to admit to his obvious crime.
Video.title: Sucker Punch

Video.summary: Unhappy about getting stopped for drinking while biking, a man takes off on foot. A woman in her PJs doesn’t know how she wound up in a stolen vehicle. Officers discover a couple smoking Meth in front of a young child.
Video.title: Getting Funky

Video.summary: A driver bails out of his vehicle after an attempted traffic stop, the suspect is ultimately tased and arrested. An officer assists with a fight call on the Las Vegas Strip. A Florida man is arrested after an unlikely story is deemed inaccurate.
Video.title: Hanky Panky

Video.summary: Officers intercept a drunk female driver using a PIT maneuver. A routine traffic stop results in an arrest after officers discover a concealed weapon as well as drugs. An officer makes an arrest after pulling over a vehicle transporting a sizable bag of marijuana.
Video.title: Dope Delivery

Video.summary: Officers give chase to a suspect on a bike. The passenger of a vehicle is arrested for possession. Police are given a classic "I'm holding it for a friend" excuse.
Video.title: Dog Eat Dog

Video.summary: Officers arrest a couple during an argument over narcotics. Police seize a large bag of marijuana after a routine stop. A man is caught harboring drugs under his tongue during questioning.
Video.title: My Better Half

Video.summary: Officers respond after a bloody man is seen prowling around an apartment complex. Officers pull over a suspicious vehicle. Police seize drugs and a large knife from a bicyclist.
Video.title: Foul Prowl

Video.summary: Officers question a couple looking to score. Officers respond to a domestic violence call in which it is unclear what exactly transpired. Officers assist on a shots fired call.
Video.title: Kiss & Make Up

Video.summary: A shots fired investigation results in a foot pursuit and the recovery of a discarded firearm. An officer intervenes in a family dispute involving a daughter, boyfriend and $9,000 in warrants. Three women are questioned in connection to a suspicious vehicle.
Video.title: Copy of Leave her Alone

Video.summary: A man jumps from a moving vehicle in an effort to escape the police. A car chase ends with a call to paramedics. An agitated man confuses threatening actions with heroism.
Video.title: Shaking Like a Paint Mixer

Video.summary: A suspected car thief ditches his ride when police spot him. Officers are called to a bar when an enraged man pulls out a knife. An argument over a bit of milk takes a violent turn.
Video.title: Crying Over Spilled Milk

Video.summary: A young lawbreaker does everything she can to escape jail. Grandpa saves the day when Mom fails to do the right thing. A traffic stop leads one deputy to suspect an elderly duo of criminal activity.
Video.title: Clueless

Video.summary: A high-speed car chase switches gears when the driver flees on foot. Tempers flare between neighbors after kids get physical. A nervous driver becomes irate after the police search his passenger.
Video.title: Between a Bush and a Hard Place

Image.alt: Between a Bush and a Hard Place
Between a Bush and a Hard Place
Between a Bush and a Hard Place
Between a Bush and a Hard Place
Between a Bush and a Hard Place
Between a Bush and a Hard Place
Between a Bush and a Hard Place
Between a Bush and a Hard Place
Between a Bush and a Hard Place

Video.summary: Emotions run high during a dispute involving alcohol and a beloved pet. A motorist struggles to keep his story straight. Deputies respond to a domestic episode and find the suspect in an awkward spot.
Video.title: Organized Crime
